data.content:
Everything works. Here's what was implemented:

**Files created/modified:**

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `Models/TicketData.cs` | ML.NET input/output data classes |
| `Models/TicketRequest.cs` | API DTOs (request, prediction response, evaluation metrics) |
| `Services/TicketClassifierService.cs` | ML.NET pipeline — text featurization, SDCA Maximum Entropy trainer, prediction & evaluation |
| `Controllers/TicketsController.cs` | Two endpoints with input validation |
| `Data/tickets.csv` | Expanded from 6 → 30 rows (10 per category) |
| `Program.cs` | Registers the classifier as a singleton |

**Endpoints:**

- **`POST /api/tickets/classify`** — Takes `{subject, description, priority}`, returns predicted category + per-class confidence scores
- **`GET /api/tickets/evaluate`** — Returns micro/macro accuracy, log-loss, and per-category precision/recall/F1

**ML Pipeline:** Text featurization (Subject + Description) → concatenate with Priority → min-max normalization → SDCA Maximum Entropy multiclass classifier.
